meaning: 电视录像制作;录像片(或盘)摄制;摄像
examples: Using high-speed videography, scientists observed surface bubbles as they burst.
Objective. To characterize the role of indocyanine-green videography in the intraoperative localization of intradural spinal tumors.
We had people who contributed photography and videography, all of which contributed to this accident investigation.
In the fourth week of CNN iReport boot camp, we challenged iReporters to show off their photography and videography skills.
Directed by newcomer Nima Nourizadeh from what must have been a stick-thin screenplay, "Project X" loses more than it gains from the "videography" gambit.
